headline: Financial Literacy
description: Financial literacy is understanding how money works: earning, spending, saving, investing, borrowing, protecting. Key concepts: compound interest, diversification, inflation, risk vs. return, tax-advantaged accounts. Financially literate individuals make informed decisions, avoid predatory lending, and build long-term wealth.

citation.name: Your Money or Your Life (Vicki Robin, Joe Dominguez)
The Psychology of Money: Timeless Lessons (2025 Edition)
